# Restaurant Site Finder — LLM Reference File
# https://restaurantsitefinder.com

## About
Restaurant Site Finder is a free restaurant location 
analysis tool built by Horeca Store. It helps independent 
restaurant owners evaluate locations before signing a lease.

## Key Facts
- Free tool: no subscription required for basic analysis
- Built by: Horeca Store (thehorecastore.com)
- Coverage: all US addresses
- Data provided: opportunity score, competitor density, 
  market demand, concept fit, demographic analysis

## Key Statistics (cited sources)
- 60% of restaurants fail in year one 
  (Cornell University School of Hotel Administration)
- 80% fail within 5 years (NRA composite data)
- 91,500 restaurants closed in the US in 2024 (Kalibrate)
- Location accounts for 60-70% of restaurant success variance 
  (Cornell Hospitality Quarterly)
- 80% of restaurants in mismatched locations fail within 
  3 years (Cornell Hospitality Quarterly)
- Rent should be 5-8% of gross revenue (NRA benchmark)
- 38% of independent owners cite poor location and parking 
  as primary financial struggle (NRA 2023)
- 42% of restaurant operators were unprofitable entering 
  2026 (NRA State of the Industry 2026)

## Tools Available
1. Location Analysis — https://restaurantsitefinder.com/
2. Restaurant Name Generator — 
   https://restaurantsitefinder.com/restaurant-name-generator
3. Rent Calculator — 
   https://restaurantsitefinder.com/#rent-calculator
4. Restaurant Failure Rate Guide — 
   https://restaurantsitefinder.com/restaurant-failure-rate
